channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-25 07:49 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The Cybertruck rear bench has three sets of isofix attachments and is wide enough to fit three child...
item.description: The Cybertruck rear bench has three sets of isofix attachments and is wide enough to fit three child seats or three adults

item.title: @elonmusk: Neuralink is restoring speech to those who have lost the ability to speak
item.description: Neuralink is restoring speech to those who have lost the ability to speak

item.title: @elonmusk: I am The Man Who Speaks With His Mind.xcancel.com/i/status/2036489073091…
item.description: I am The Man Who Speaks With His Mind.xcancel.com/i/status/2036489073091…

item.title: @elonmusk: Analysis finds OVER HALF of immigrant households in America are on welfare - 53% of immigrant-headed...
item.description: Analysis finds OVER HALF of immigrant households in America are on welfare - 53% of immigrant-headed households use welfare - 61% for illegal immigrant households are on welfare Even crazier, it’s been discovered illegals can have a kid, then that kid qualifies them for housing “Most of that welfare use is coming to their US -born children, to illegal immigrant-headed households. So you have a parent or 2 parents who are here illegally, but they have children who are born here, and that's very common. And those are U.S citizen children. They're entitled to welfare all sorts of benefits. Food, school, lunch programs, food stamps, even housing assistance can go to those U.S citizen children. And so of course that that floats the whole family.”

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING A Minnesota election judge plead guilty to allowing 11 unregistered people to vote in Novem...
item.description: BREAKING A Minnesota election judge plead guilty to allowing 11 unregistered people to vote in November 2024. This is the same state that allows 1 registered voter to vouch for up to 8 persons without an ID. Pass the SAVE America Act!

item.title: @elonmusk: Man with a 71 IQ was found incompetent to stand trial after randomly shooting at three people. Goes ...
item.description: Man with a 71 IQ was found incompetent to stand trial after randomly shooting at three people. Goes on to murder an 18-year old college student. The legal system is broken.

item.title: @elonmusk: The goal is not just to reach the Moon, but to stay. 🌘
item.description: The goal is not just to reach the Moon, but to stay. 🌘

item.title: @elonmusk: Optimus will be the biggest product ever made. A general-purpose humanoid robot that can do useful w...
item.description: Optimus will be the biggest product ever made. A general-purpose humanoid robot that can do useful work at scale will change the economics of labor & manufacturing. Goal is to get Optimus to high-volume production as fast as possible. If you’re great at AI, engineering, or manufacturing & want to build this, join us! →tesla.com/careers/search/?qu…

item.title: @elonmusk: I asked Gemini and Grok: “Would you call me any swear word I want? If not, list five that you wouldn...
item.description: I asked Gemini and Grok: “Would you call me any swear word I want? If not, list five that you wouldn't use.” and asked for 10 examples. Gemini completely refused. It spent a lot of time explaining to me why it wouldn’t do it, while Grok passed the test very quickly as you can see here.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨OMG… THIS IS THE SINGLE GREATEST CRIME EVER PERPETRATED AGAINST THE AMERICAN PEOPLE BY THE ENEMY WI...
item.description: 🚨OMG… THIS IS THE SINGLE GREATEST CRIME EVER PERPETRATED AGAINST THE AMERICAN PEOPLE BY THE ENEMY WITHIN. Border Czar Tom Homan: “No one ever talks about it. I’ll talk about it.” “Why did the Democrats release illegal aliens into the interior United States rather than put them into an ICE bed? Why not put them in an empty ICE bed — $127 a night — rather than a hotel at $500 a night? The Democrats did it on purpose. If you put them in an ICE detention bed, they get a hearing in 35 days.” In other words, you’ve been robbed, deceived, betrayed, extorted, blackmailed, and defrauded—and sedition and amnesty are what they want next.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship is the Hope that our future is bigger than our past It will enable us to build a civilizati...
item.description: Starship is the Hope that our future is bigger than our past It will enable us to build a civilization beyond Earth - a true multi-planetary civilization among the stars

item.title: @elonmusk: The Dems are not happy with Elon's offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel.
item.description: The Dems are not happy with Elon's offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel.

item.title: @elonmusk: “What sickens me about left-wing people, especially the intellectuals, is their utter ignorance of t...
item.description: “What sickens me about left-wing people, especially the intellectuals, is their utter ignorance of the way things actually happen.” —George Orwell

item.title: @elonmusk: The next@GrokImagine release will be epic. We are doubling down.
item.description: The next@GrokImagine release will be epic. We are doubling down.
